name: Treemap

props.name: aspectRatio
props.description: The treemap will try to keep every single rectangle's aspect ratio near the aspectRatio given

props.name: autoContrast
props.description: Determines whether text color should be adjusted based on background color to improve contrast

props.name: dataKey
props.description: Key in data object for the value

props.name: strokeColor
props.description: Controls color of the node stroke, by default depends on color scheme

props.name: tooltipProps
props.description: Props passed down to Tooltip recharts component

props.name: treemapProps

props.name: valueFormatter
props.description: A function to format values inside the tooltip
